overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player walking through a dimly lit underground shantytown market beneath massive concrete infrastructure. The environment features neon-lit food stalls, slot machines, and industrial debris, with a dense cyberpunk atmosphere enhanced by volumetric fog and dramatic artificial lighting.

events.description: passing through metal security gate into the underground market area
moving from dim gate area into neon-lit market corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the metal security gate into the underground shantytown market

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall preparing items
pedestrian walking away from camera into the market

entered.detail: vertical metal bars blocking the entrance, partially open
massive curved concrete structure forming the ceiling
market stall with glowing neon signs and warm lighting
rusted corrugated metal sheets forming shanty walls

segments.scene_description: The player enters through a metal security gate into a narrow underground market corridor. Massive concrete arches loom overhead while neon-lit food stalls and corrugated metal shanty walls line the path. Sparse pedestrians move through the dimly lit space as the camera moves forward into the market.

events.description: passing by slot machines with bright digital displays
slowing down to observe the surroundings near the seated person

agents.ego_description: walking past slot machines and a seated homeless person while observing the market

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on the ground surrounded by trash and red glowing lights
customer standing at food stall counter

entered.detail: blue arcade machines with bright BIG text and fruit symbols
litter and debris covering the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the market, the player passes bright blue slot machines on the right and a seated homeless person surrounded by trash. The concrete support arches recede to the left as the camera approaches a food service counter where customers are gathered.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy food service stall with customers

events.description: crowd density increases near the food service counter
turning slightly left to navigate around customers

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the food stall vendor and customers

notable_agents.action: food vendor wearing mask and cap serving customers behind the counter
customer in striped pants waiting at the counter

entered.detail: long stainless steel counter with digital menu displays
plastic coolers and storage bins stacked near the stall
long yellow fluorescent tubes illuminating the area

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a busy food stall with a masked vendor serving customers. Overhead fluorescent lights mix with neon glow to illuminate the stainless steel counter and blue storage containers. The crowd density increases as NPCs queue for food, and the player navigates around them.

events.description: moving from enclosed market stalls into open industrial underpass area
lighting becomes dimmer with only sparse red accent lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the open industrial area with large concrete beams and scattered debris

entered.detail: giant angled concrete support pillar with exposed rebar
barriers with red neon strip lights on the ground
thick black cables and wires hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Leaving the food stall behind, the player enters a wide-open industrial underpass with massive angled concrete beams. The area is nearly empty of people, with only red glowing barriers and overhead cables visible in the dim light. Debris litters the concrete floor as the player moves toward a metal ramp.

events.description: ascending ramp and revealing large armored vehicle below
turning right to enter dark corridor

agents.ego_description: walking up the metal ramp and pausing to look down at the armored vehicle in the bay below

notable_agents.action: large armored military tank parked in the lower bay area

entered.detail: metal grated ramp with red neon edge lighting
heavy white and gray armored tank with turret
rusted metal railing along the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a metal ramp with red neon lighting, revealing a large armored military vehicle parked in a bay below. From the elevated catwalk with rusted railings, the camera overlooks the industrial space before turning toward a dark corridor entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark maintenance corridor with window overlook

events.description: electrical sparks illuminate the dark descent
emerging from dark corridor into lower market area

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the dark stairs with electrical sparks flying nearby, then emerging into a lower market level

entered.detail: narrow concrete walls with graffiti and pipes
small window revealing lit market area beyond
bright blue and orange sparks falling from damaged wiring

segments.scene_description: The player descends through a narrow dark corridor where electrical sparks illuminate the path. Passing a small window overlooking another market area, the camera continues down until emerging into a lower level with distant neon signs and market stalls visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic underground market into a vast industrial underpass and finally down into a lower subterranean level. It begins by passing through a metal security gate into a narrow corridor defined by massive concrete arches and neon-lit shanty stalls. As the camera moves deeper, the environment shifts from the solitude of blue slot machines and debris toward a crowded food service counter where fluorescent lights illuminate a masked vendor and queuing customers. The scene then opens into a wide, desolate industrial underpass characterized by angled concrete beams and red glowing barriers before the camera ascends a neon-lit metal ramp to overlook an armored military vehicle. Finally, the perspective descends through a dark, sparking corridor and past a small window, emerging into a lower level where distant neon signs and market stalls reappear.
